title: CYLINDER BLOCK - Disassembly (Cont'd) / Inspection

figures_detected.description: Piston pin press stand with tools KV10116610, KV10116620, and ST13040000 used for disassembling piston and connecting rod
Main bearing beam bolt loosening sequence diagram showing numbered bolt order
Crankcase breather bracket location on cylinder block
Filter mesh removed from crankcase breather bracket
Measuring inner diameter of piston pin hole with dial bore gauge

steps.text: When disassembling piston and connecting rod, use piston pin press stand at room temperature.
Remove main bearing beam and crankshaft.
notes: Before removing main bearing beam, measure crankshaft end play (see crankshaft assembly section).
Bolts should be loosened in two or three stages and in the order shown.

steps.text: Remove the crankcase breather bracket. Remove the filter mesh. Clean filter before refitting.
Measure inner diameter of piston pin hole.

items.label: Piston pin hole inner diameter (Standard) - CG10DE
